sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Philoponus, Joannes</hi> Philosophus [Phlp.] <date TEIform="date">vi A.D.</date> Idem qui Joannes Alexandrinus, q. v. <title_ TEIform="title">in APo. = in Aristotelis Analytica Posteriora commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xiii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iii), Berlin 1909. <title_ TEIform="title">in APr. = in Aristotelis Analytica Priora commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xiii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1905. <title_ TEIform="title">in Cat. = Philoponi (olim Ammonii) in Aristotelis Categorias com- mentarium,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xiii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1898. <title_ TEIform="title">in de An. = in Aristotelis de Anima libros commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xv), Berlin 1897. <title_ TEIform="title">in GA = Philoponi (Michaelis Ephesii) in libros de Generatione Animalium commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xiv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iii), Berlin 1903. <title_ TEIform="title">in GC = in Aristotelis libros de Generatione et Corruptione com- mentaria,</title_> ed. Hieronymus Vitelli (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xiv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1897. <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete. = in Aristot<*>lis Meteorologicorum librum primum com- mentarium,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xiv </item>
